summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Altura Property landing page. All backend APIs pass. Frontend loads correctly with all section testids present. Lead form multi-step works end-to-end. Mobile responsive. Minor missing testids in Pricing and FAQ components.

minor.issue: property_type has no enum validation — accepts 'invalid' with 200. Spec expects 422 for invalid property_type values (beli|sewa|investasi).

issues: Missing data-testid='pricing-price-*' on price elements — cannot assert price values programmatically
Missing data-testid='pricing-popular-badge' on Growth tier badge
Missing data-testid='faq-answer-{i}' on answer content elements — cannot assert expansion state

action_items: Add enum validator for property_type in LeadIn model: Literal['beli','sewa','investasi']
Add data-testid='pricing-price-{tier}' to price display elements in Pricing.jsx
Add data-testid='pricing-popular-badge' to the popular badge in Pricing.jsx
Add data-testid='faq-answer-{i}' to FAQ answer content in FAQ.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 138: `logger` is used before it is defined (logger defined at line 170). This works at runtime because the code path only executes at request time after module load, but it's a code smell — move logging.basicConfig and logger definition before route definitions.
LeadIn.property_type and LeadIn.source accept any string — should use Literal types for strict validation per spec

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all core flows work; minor missing testids for price/faq-answer)

seed_data_creation: Test leads created during testing (TEST_ prefix not used since no cleanup endpoint). Multiple Budi Santoso entries in leads collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. Lead form full flow tested and working. Property_type enum validation missing in backend. Pricing testids for price values and popular badge are missing. FAQ answer testids missing. Mobile responsive works fine. Gallery lightbox open/close works.
